title: Gina routing.json
description: Route definitions for a Gina bundle. Each key is a route name; the value defines the URL pattern, HTTP method, controller action, and optional middleware chain.

namespace.description: Controller namespace. Maps to controller.<namespace>.js. Groups related routes under the same controller file.

url.description: URL pattern. Use :param for named segments. Multiple patterns can be comma-separated (e.g. "/item/:id, /item/:id/:slug"). The webroot is prepended automatically unless param.ignoreWebRoot is set.

requirements.description: Validation patterns for URL parameters. Keys match :param names. Values are regex strings (prefixed with "/") or validator references (prefixed with "validator::").

param.description: Controller action mapping and static/dynamic params passed to the action.

control.description: Controller action name (camelCase method on the bundle controller).

file.description: Template file path relative to the bundle views directory (without extension). Defaults to the route name.

path.description: Redirect target path. Used with control: "redirect".

ignoreWebRoot.description: When true, the bundle webroot prefix is not prepended to the URL.

title.description: Page title passed to the template.

isPopinContext.description: Set to true for routes rendered inside a popin overlay.

middleware.description: Ordered list of middleware to run before the controller action. Format: "middlewares.<namespace>.<name>".

middlewareIgnored.description: Middleware names to skip for this route (overrides global middleware).

bundle.description: Target bundle name for cross-bundle routing. The request is proxied to the named bundle.

hostname.description: Override target hostname for cross-bundle or external routing.

scopes.description: Allowed scopes for this route. Defaults to the current bundle scope.

cache.description: Response caching configuration. Use a string for the cache type shorthand, or an object for full control.

sliding.description: Enable sliding window eviction. Defaults to false.

maxAge.description: Absolute ceiling in seconds when sliding is enabled.

invalidateOnEvents.description: Event names that invalidate the cached response.

_comment.description: Internal documentation comment. Stripped at server init.

_sample.description: Example URL for this route. Ignored at runtime.
